CREATE TABLE test.hits (CounterID Int32, GoalsReached Array(Int32));
SELECT count() AS Reaches, countIf(num = 1) AS Hits FROM test.hits ARRAY JOIN GoalsReached, arrayEnumerate(GoalsReached) AS num WHERE CounterID = 160656 LIMIT 10;
SELECT sum(length(GoalsReached)) AS Reaches, count() AS Hits FROM test.hits WHERE (CounterID = 160656) AND notEmpty(GoalsReached);

SELECT count(*) AS Reaches, countIf(num = 1) AS Hits FROM (SELECT GoalsReached FROM test.hits WHERE CounterID IN (SELECT CounterID FROM test.hits WHERE length(GoalsReached) > 0)) ARRAY JOIN GoalsReached, arrayEnumerate(GoalsReached) AS num;
SELECT avg(num) AS AverageIndex FROM (SELECT GoalsReached FROM test.hits WHERE CounterID = 160656) ARRAY JOIN GoalsReached, arrayEnumerate(GoalsReached) AS num;
SELECT CounterID, count() AS Reaches, countIf(num = 1) AS Hits FROM test.hits ARRAY JOIN GoalsReached, arrayEnumerate(GoalsReached) AS num GROUP BY CounterID;
INSERT INTO test.hits_backup SELECT * FROM test.hits WHERE GoalsReached[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT count(*) AS Reaches FROM (SELECT GoalsReached FROM test.hits ARRAY JOIN GoalsReached, arrayEnumerate(GoalsReached) AS num WHERE CounterID = 160657) WHERE num > 2 LIMIT 5;

WITH (SELECT sum(length(GoalsReached)) FROM test.hits WHERE CounterID = 160656) AS TotalReaches SELECT TotalReaches, count() AS Hits FROM test.hits WHERE CounterID = 160656 AND notEmpty(GoalsReached);
